channel.title: Paper Trading on Judy AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Paper Trading on Judy AI Lab

item.title: Your Strategy Has 87% Win Rate? Z-Score Says: That's an Illusion
item.description: Our paper trading system ran 33 trades with an 87% win rate on paper. Then we added Z-score statistical testing — and every single strategy failed. Here's why that's actually good news.

item.title: Quantitative Trading System Build: From First Backtest Code to Paper Trading
item.description: We spent two weeks building a complete quantitative trading system from scratch — four strategies, eight Walk-Forward validations, Z-score statistical tests, Paper Trading. This article documents the entire process, including the biggest pitfalls we encountered.
